name: Almond Bark
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Semisweet chocolate chips OR 1 lb White candy coating
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread almonds in a baking pan and toast in a 350°F oven for about 8 minutes, shaking the pan occasionally.
2. Let cool.
3. Line a rimmed 10x15 inch pan with wax paper, covering the bottom and sides of the pan.
4. Place chocolate chips or candy coating in the top of a double boiler.
5. Add shortening, stir over barely simmering water just until the mixture begins to melt.
6. Remove from heat; stir until completely melted.
7. Stir in toasted almonds.
8. Turn the mixture into the pan and spread to distribute nuts evenly. To spread more smoothly, drop the pan onto the counter several times from a height of about 8 inches.
9. Refrigerate candy just until firm.
10. Break into pieces before serving.
11. Store, covered airtight, and refrigerate for up to 3 weeks.
